label: Mental break
description: Defines a mental break trigger: the conditions under which a pawn snaps into a linked MentalStateDef, including commonality, intensity, and trait or gene requirements.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# MentalBreakWorker subclass that controls break triggering logic.

mentalState.label: Mental state
mentalState.description: MentalStateDef that the pawn enters when this break fires.

baseCommonality.label: Base commonality
baseCommonality.description: Base relative weight for this break when selecting which break fires. Higher values increase chance.

commonalityFactorPerPopulationCurve.label: Commonality factor per population curve
commonalityFactorPerPopulationCurve.description: Multiplier curve applied to baseCommonality based on colony population. X is population count, Y is the multiplier.

intensity.label: Intensity
intensity.description: Severity tier of this break, used by the mood threshold system to determine when it can trigger.

requiredTrait.label: Required trait
requiredTrait.description: TraitDef that a pawn must have for this break to be eligible.

requiredGene.label: Required gene
requiredGene.description: GeneDef that a pawn must have for this break to be eligible (Biotech expansion).

anomalousBreak.label: Anomalous break
anomalousBreak.description: If true, this break is part of the Anomaly expansion and only triggers under anomaly conditions.

questLodgersCanDo.label: Quest lodgers can do
questLodgersCanDo.description: Whether quest lodger pawns (e.g. allied guests) are eligible for this break.

requiredPrecept.label: Required precept
requiredPrecept.description: PreceptDef that a pawn's ideology must include for this break to be eligible (Ideology expansion).

layerWhitelist.label: Layer whitelist
layerWhitelist.description: If non-empty, this break can only trigger on these PlanetLayerDefs (Odyssey expansion).

basic-mental-break.label: Basic mental break
basic-mental-break.description: Mental break with a linked mental state, intensity, and commonality.
